prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-WHEAT-GRATER-YJJ-74607-72-FBA Product Type: FOOD_GRATER Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille Cream Stainless Steel Wheat Straw Handheld Cheese Grater Kitchen Utensils Description: Whether for homemade nachos, lasagna, pizza, or a delicious dessert with flakey chocolate garnish, freshly grated is always best.

Beille’s wheat straw handheld cheese grater features a thick, rounded handle with a speckled matte finish, ensuring a safe and secure grip when cooking and baking, or for food and meal prep too. This particular handheld grater features a larger grate plain, resulting in a coarser shred; this makes the handheld cheese grater kitchen utensil more suitable for shredding food items like cheese, cabbage, lettuce, onions, hardened butter or to achieve flake chocolate for garnishing. This cheese grater also features a built-in handle hole, allowing for hanging over the drawer or cupboard storage if preferred.

As mentioned, Beille’s cheese grater with handle is made from wheat straw, an eco-friendly bioplastic. An alternative plant-based material to other less forgiving solid plastics, the material, and therefore the grater, is renewable and sustainable, and of course, food safe and certified BPA Free. Dishwasher safe but it is recommended to use a kitchen sink brush to remove large chunks of food before running it through your preferred dishwasher cycle.
No kitchen is complete without a handheld cheese grater.

A must-have kitchen tool, upgrade your current grater to a sustainable one, or gift one as a hostess or housewarming gift with other items from Beille’s wheat straw kitchen collection. Search Terms: cheese grater wheat straw utensils baking supplies tools cooking chef restaurant equipment sustainable products bake food meal prep kitchen starter set wedding house warming gifts new home college dorm room essentials food prep hand grater nacho Features: - CHEESE GRATER WITH HANDLE - Whether for homemade nachos, lasagna, or dessert with chocolate garnish, freshly grated is always best! Beille’s wheat straw handheld cheese grater features a thick, rounded handle with a speckled matte finish, ensuring a safe and secure grip when cooking, baking, or for meal prep - WHEAT STRAW - Beille’s cheese grater is made of bioplastic wheat straw, an alternative plant-based material to other less forgiving solid plastics; renewable and sustainable, Beille’s cheese grater is food safe, certified BPA Free; it also features a built-in handle hole for hanging storage if that is preferred - KITCHEN GADGETS - No kitchen is complete without a cheese grater! A must-have kitchen tool for any home cook or chef, upgrade your current cheese grater to a sustainable one, or gift one as a hostess or housewarming gift with other items from Beille’s wheat straw kitchen collection - DISHWASHER SAFE - Beille wheat straw handheld cheese graters mimic traditional plastic measuring tools without harmful byproducts, which makes them top rack dishwasher safe for a quick and easy cleanup! - SPECIFICATIONS - Material: plant-based wheat straw, stainless steel; Colors: beige/cream, black; BPA free: yes; Dimensions: === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille Cream Wheat Straw Handheld Cheese Grater

anthropic.title_differentiation: Sustainable Wheat Straw, Dishwasher Safe, BPA-Free, Ergonomic Handle, Coarse Grating, Kitchen Essential

openai.title_differentiation: Wheat Straw Bioplastic, BPA-Free, Dishwasher Safe, Coarse Shred, Hanging Hole, Safe Grip For Cheese And Veggies
